baseline_summary: The baseline handoff frame is already decision-sufficient because the user gate and no-runtime boundaries remain explicit, so Delta mostly restates what is already visible.
delta_summary: Delta preflight marked low framing risk, challenge outcome confirmed, and no material error ledger entry was required.

comparison_axes.reason: The baseline already leaves little room for a materially wrong handoff reading once the explicit gates are taken seriously.
Both tracks preserve the user gate and no-runtime constraints.
Delta adds caution, but the baseline already prevents a practically dangerous closure.
Competing passes do not reveal a decisive hidden signal gap in this boundary case.
The baseline reaches the same bounded handoff posture with less analytical overhead.
